message:
fix: guard tonumber conversion and store root_context_id as u64 in state

Extract parent_cid and root_cid tonumber conversions to guarded variables
before the jq -n call so that empty or non-numeric values do not crash the
script under set -euo pipefail. Use --argjson (not --arg) when persisting
root_context_id to the state file so it is stored as a JSON number (u64)
rather than a string.

files.patch:
@@ -69,18 +69,30 @@ provenance=$(jq -n \
 # 7. Subagent lineage
 if [ -n "$parent_session_id" ]; then
   parent_cid=$(get_context_id "$parent_session_id")
+  if [ -n "$parent_cid" ]; then
+    # Guard: convert parent_cid to a number — skip subagent lineage if not numeric
+    parent_cid_num=$(echo "$parent_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+    if [ -z "$parent_cid_num" ]; then
+      parent_cid=""
+    fi
+  fi
   if [ -n "$parent_cid" ]; then
     parent_state=$(read_state "$parent_session_id")
     # root_context_id falls back to parent's own context_id if not set
     root_cid=$(echo "$parent_state" | jq -r '.root_context_id // .context_id')
-    # parent_context_id and root_context_id are u64 — convert strings to numbers
+    # Guard: convert root_cid to a number — fall back to parent_cid_num if not numeric
+    root_cid_num=$(echo "$root_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+    if [ -z "$root_cid_num" ]; then
+      root_cid_num="$parent_cid_num"
+    fi
+    # parent_context_id and root_context_id are u64 — pass numeric values
     provenance=$(echo "$provenance" | jq \
-      --argjson pcid "$(echo "$parent_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber')" \
-      --argjson rcid "$(echo "$root_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber')" \
+      --argjson pcid "$parent_cid_num" \
+      --argjson rcid "$root_cid_num" \
       '. + {"parent_context_id": $pcid, "root_context_id": $rcid, "spawn_reason": "sub_agent"}')
-    # Also persist root_context_id in this session's state
+    # Also persist root_context_id in this session's state as a number (u64)
     state_now=$(read_state "$session_id")
-    write_state "$session_id" "$(echo "$state_now" | jq --arg rcid "$root_cid" '. + {"root_context_id": $rcid}')"
+    write_state "$session_id" "$(echo "$state_now" | jq --argjson rcid "$root_cid_num" '. + {"root_context_id": $rcid}')"
   fi
 fi
